batch_summary.note: 1 primary RF-15 flag(s). See primary_flags for details.

primary_flags.summary: Vaping/asthma distortion + pinching false allegation, Jun 7-8 2025. ROW-9735: 'Olivia said you vaped in front of her and threatened to pinch her.' Vaping (Category B): partially real incident — Eli confirmed vaping occasionally outside. However, embedded in manufactured cat-allergy/asthma gatekeeping scheme (ADD-006: Olivia raised with pets from birth; allergy specialist visit manufactured asthma documentation used to deny visitation). Pinching threat (Category A): Eli has no recollection of any such incident. Compound RF-15+RF-08 (relay mechanism) + RF-02 (manufactured medical pretext for gatekeeping). ROW-9736: 'She said Abby laughed at her for coughing' — Abby-as-harmful-actor framing, Category C secondary.
